author: mcclec07
name: Audited Byte-Level Neural + Legal PPM-D BPB: 1.5221 (Full Validation) — Framework for Legal Score-First PPM-D Mixtures
blurb: Non-record methodology submission: formal proof that the previously reported PPM-D mixture BPB is invalid due to normalization defects, plus two architecturally valid correction paths. Path B now has a full-validation audited result (mixture_bpb 1.522083436941375, neural_only_bpb 1.5430141193268014, denominator_match=true, claim_ready=true) on 151,078,222 bytes. Path A archived as computationally intractable. Base model: 11-layer 512d SP8192, depth recurrence, INT6+brotli, TTT.
val_bpb_invalid_ppm_mixture_note: INVALID — see README.md for formal proof of normalization failure. This value is reported for reference only and should NOT be treated as a valid BPB.
val_bpb_note: Full-validation Path B byte-level mixture BPB = 1.5221 is now available (claim_ready=true). This is a byte-level metric, not directly comparable to the token-level sliding BPB of 1.0830. See README.md for formal mathematical description of the difference.
path_b_subset_note: Audited first-8M-token sliding-only Path B subset result on the exp_1876 artifact. This is a corrected subset result, not a corrected full-validation contest claim; no TTT Path B result exists.
path_b_full_validation_corrected_bpb_not: Audited full-validation Path B byte-level mixture BPB. claim_ready=true, denominator_match=true.
methodology_contributions: Formal proof that geometric-mean neural byte decomposition is not a valid probability distribution (Theorem 2)
Formal proof that PPM-D without exclusion does not normalize (Theorem 1 note)
Formal proof that the resulting mixture is not normalized (Theorem 3)
Verification that score-before-update ordering is correct (Theorem 4)
Verification that byte denominator is correct (Theorem 5)
Verification that distributed coverage is correct (Theorem 6)
Path A: Token-normalized PPM mixture design with C++ pybind11 backend (archived as computationally intractable — O(V=8192) per position)

Path B: Byte-level trie marginalization with proper PPM-D exclusion — full-validation audited result (mixture_bpb 1.522083436941375, neural_only_bpb 1.5430141193268014, ppm_d_only_bpb 2.031906041587864, scored_bytes 151078222, denominator_match=true, claim_ready=true)
Independent corroboration of normalization invalidity alongside PR #1905
Formal mathematical description of byte-level vs token-level BPB metrics
